CustomField.description: Currency to CHF exchange rate field => In this field the Conversion Rate XYZ to CHF on Date ABC is stored Currency to SDG exchange rate field => In this field the Conversion Rate XYZ to SGD on Date ABC is stored Date of exchange rate field => Field that contains the date ABC used to get conversion rate Currency field => Field that contains the currency XYZ used to get conversion rate
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Turns Dated Currency Management on for this Object. All the Picklist fields have then be to assigned exactly once to one field
CustomField.label: Currency management field type

value.fullName: Currency to CHF exchange rate field
value.label: Currency to CHF exchange rate field

value.fullName: Currency to SGD exchange rate field
value.label: Currency to SGD exchange rate field
